subject: tieng-anh
topic: Ôn tập giữa học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh 6

questions.question: What does 'cartoon' mean? (Từ 'cartoon' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'bóng rổ'? ('bóng rổ' tiếng Anh là gì?)
Choose the correct verb: '___ football' (chơi bóng đá)
Choose the comparative form of 'tall'. (Dạng so sánh hơn của 'tall')
Complete: 'I watch ___ every evening.' (xem ti vi — điền 'TV')
Match the TV programme with its meaning (Nối chương trình ti vi với nghĩa)
Choose the superlative: 'Tokyo is one of the ___ cities in the world.' (lớn nhất)
Choose the correct verb: '___ swimming' (đi bơi)

statements.text: A cartoon is a TV programme for children.

questions.question: Complete with the comparative of 'big': 'My city is ___ than your village.'
Which one is a sport? (Đâu là một môn thể thao?)
Choose the correct sentence (Chọn câu đúng)
options: Ha Noi is bigger than Hue.

questions.passage: Tom likes watching TV. His favourite programme is a cartoon called Tom and Jerry. He watches it every Sunday morning. He also likes playing football with his friends after school.
questions.question: What is Tom's favourite TV programme? (Chương trình ti vi yêu thích của Tom là gì?)

questions.passage: Tom likes watching TV. His favourite programme is a cartoon called Tom and Jerry. He watches it every Sunday morning. He also likes playing football with his friends after school.
questions.question: When does Tom watch his favourite programme? (Tom xem chương trình đó khi nào?)

questions.passage: Tom likes watching TV. His favourite programme is a cartoon called Tom and Jerry. He watches it every Sunday morning. He also likes playing football with his friends after school.
questions.question: What does Tom do after school? (Tom làm gì sau giờ học?)
You want to ask your friend's favourite sport (Em muốn hỏi môn thể thao yêu thích của bạn)
